textByHashes.39baa252f63175195c371fb0ef9fcb6dbbf0f5ae: Why do you want to know?
textByHashes.c373ec01a2f60efbd15cee56ceac2190ef482912: It's not a human city either, but you're here all the same.
textByHashes.eaab30000af94ac88549ac353890f2dc6d708daa: Anyway, we're here to do some business with one of the companies of the Consortium. Getting supplies for our people back at, er, the Grand Tree.
textByHashes.494f486feea655d4800062b3708c810c2c5904a6: Oh, nothing special, nothing special I assure you... it's just that the dwarves have everything in large supplies.
